description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:cosmic Docker image with three stages: get_deps, build, and test. In the get_deps stage add a get dependencies job that runs apt update -qq && apt install -y -qq git then utils/updateDependencies, and stores ./extlib/ as an artifact. In the build stage define a hidden .build template that runs apt update -qq && apt install -y -qq cmake make git before each job. Extend this template with two parallel jobs: all builds clang (allow_failure) that installs clang via apt and runs test/run -v compilation, and all builds gcc (allow_failure) that installs g++ via apt and runs the same test/run command. Also in the build stage add a build for tests job that installs g++ via apt, runs test/run -v build_for_tests, and publishes ./bin/test/install/ as an artifact. Finally, in the test stage add a cmake sanity job that runs apt update -qq && apt install -y -qq make cmake before script and then executes test/run -v cmake.
